features.name: MLflow Model Tracking & Serving
features.description: Integrates Datagrok with an MLflow server to run, track, and manage ML models, including containerized serving via a boto-enabled compute backend.
features.evidence_summary: The user-facing guide 'Using MLFlow models', the README, and the boto/container changelog entries all describe a single integration theme: connecting Datagrok to an MLflow backend to run and track ML models.

features.name: MLflow Model Info Panel
features.description: Surfaces MLflow model metadata (runs, metrics, parameters) as a Datagrok context/info panel displayed alongside data in the workspace.
features.evidence_summary: Three info-panel platform docs are bundled with this plugin, indicating it registers a Datagrok info panel to display MLflow model details in context.
